caption: A woman with blonde curly hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a recording studio. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a stand, facing slightly to her left with a smile. Behind her is a white wall with a thick yellow vertical stripe and a black monitor displaying the word "Johnson" in red text above a white graphic. To her right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in red and white, accompanied by a logo and the phrase "Boss 11 Logo Studio." In the bottom left of each frame, a logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST." Across the sequence, the woman remains in a similar position, maintaining her expression and posture while slightly shifting her head and smile, indicating she is engaged in a conversation.
